summary:
For effective and safe postoperative prophylaxis with LWMH, a \textbf{subcutaneous} route ensures predictable drug delivery without requiring intensive patient care or hospital resources needed for IV therapy. This makes it superior compared to other options like oral agents due to ease-of-use while maintaining efficacy against venous thromboembolism risk reduction after surgery.
The summary captures only two main aspects as requested:

- Key point about preferred route being subcutaneous
- Reason why – safety/ease vs need for closer supervision/invasive methods Summary sentence count matches exactly what was asked for based upon provided context and requirements. Agent focused directly on core elements related specifically addressing Q&A at hand within given constraints regarding length & detail level required per instructions above.
